◎简　　介  

　　In the midst of time comes the clanging of steel against steel, a collision of myth and history.... "Vikingdom". Based on Viking legends and the epic poems they left as record, "Vikingdom" is a fantasy, action adventure about a forgotten king, Eirick, who was tasked with the impossible odds to defeat Thor, the God of Thunder. Thor is on a mission to gather the key ancient relic...
